claim: T2A CMAX=2 Trans-candidate census (108,762 entries) has only 4 distinct values of R1=a4/b2^2, all positive: {1/4: 26622, 1/2: 27822, 1/1: 26548, 2/1: 27770}. R1=-2/9 unreachable because |b2|<=2 forces b2^2 in {1,4}.

T2A CMAX=2 Trans-candidate sub-leading ratio R2=a2/b1^2 distribution (R2 defined when b1!=0, n=87,402): top values {0/1: 17134, +-1/2: 9342/8338, +-2/1: 9340/8340, +-1/1: 8898/8360, +-1/4: 8894/8358}. No -1/9 or -2/9 hits; flagged values include +1/4 (8894 hits, Class B sub-leading) and -1/4 (8358 hits, Class A double-root sub-leading).

Three minimum-norm representative families at top R1 concentrations (R1=1/4: a=[1,0,0,0,0] b=[-2,0,0]; R1=1/2: a=[2,0,0,0,0] b=[-2,0,0]; R1=2: a=[2,0,0,0,0] b=[-1,0,0]) recomputed at dps=300, K=2500, all stable to >300 digits (rel_spread<5e-301). Limits L1=-4.05723373..., L2=-1.14342651..., L3=-0.53339518.... PSLQ at hmax=1e12, tol=1e-200 against {1, pi, pi^2, log 2, log pi} (additive) and {L, L*pi, L*log2, 1, pi, log2} (multiplicative): NO RELATION found for any of the three. Trans classification re-confirmed.

Symbolic indicial polynomials for deg-(d, d/2) PCFs (d in {2,4,6}) are formally identical: BT (rescaled) I_BT(t) = t^2 - t - rho_d (Disc 1+4 rho_d); Frobenius I_F(r) = r^2 - r + rho_d (Disc 1-4 rho_d). Dimension d enters only through rho_d = a_d / b_{d/2}^2.

Class B (Frobenius apparent-singularity) magic locus is the isolated point rho = +1/4 where Disc_F = 0 and the double Frobenius root r = 1/2 (Lean Thm 5/6 cf. Thm66_ApparentSingularity.lean). Distinct closed form from Class A; HALT condition (single family unifying all magic ratios) NOT triggered.

Cross-degree probe at deg-(4,2) for rho = -2/9 is UNRESOLVED in T2A CMAX=2 census because the integer lattice |b_2|<=2 forces b_2^2 in {1,4} and 9 is unreachable. Empirical resolution requires CMAX>=3 census (b_2 in {+-3} adds 6/(7^7) approx 4.5% of hyperplane volume, ~1.4M new families).
